name: Patient 7
history: History of long work hours and demanding environments. Unresolved issues with father including past abuse. Recent exchange of letters addressing history.
worthless_belief: I am bad - dangerous, toxic, evil
intermediate_belief: I don't deserve to succeed because of my family history.
intermediate_belief_depression: My past trauma makes me incapable of productive work.
coping_strategies: Procrastination, distraction with social media, avoidance of meaningful work.
situation: Evaluating progress on personal projects. Spending time on social media instead of working.
auto_thought: What's the point? Nothing I create will matter anyway.
behavior: Scroll social media instead of working on website project.
